title: Construction Laborers
description: Perform tasks involving physical labor at construction sites. May operate hand and power tools of all types: air hammers, earth tampers, cement mixers, small mechanical hoists, surveying and measuring equipment, and a variety of other equipment and instruments. May clean and prepare sites, dig trenches, set braces to support the sides of excavations, erect scaffolding, and clean up rubble, debris, and other waste materials. May assist other craft workers.

tasks.text: Tend pumps, compressors, or generators to provide power for tools, machinery, or equipment or to heat or move materials, such as asphalt.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Lubricate, clean, or repair machinery, equipment, or tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Signal equipment operators to facilitate alignment, movement, or adjustment of machinery, equipment, or materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read plans, instructions, or specifications to determine work activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Measure, mark, or record openings or distances to layout areas where construction work will be performed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean or prepare construction sites to eliminate possible hazards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dig ditches or trenches, backfill excavations, or compact and level earth to grade specifications, using picks, shovels, pneumatic tampers, or rakes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Load, unload, or identify building materials, machinery, or tools, distributing them to the appropriate locations, according to project plans or specifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Position, join, align, or seal structural components, such as concrete wall sections or pipes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform site activities required of green certified construction practices, such as implementing waste management procedures, identifying materials for reuse, or installing erosion or sedimentation control mechanisms.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Control traffic passing near, in, or around work zones.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install sewer, water, or storm drain pipes, using pipe-laying machinery or laser guidance equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate or maintain air monitoring or other sampling devices in confined or hazardous environments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Smooth or finish freshly poured cement or concrete, using floats, trowels, screeds, or powered cement finishing tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Erect or dismantle scaffolding, shoring, braces, traffic barricades, ramps, or other temporary structures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide assistance to craft workers, such as carpenters, plasterers, or masons.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Spray materials, such as water, sand, steam, vinyl, paint, or stucco, through hoses to clean, coat, or seal surfaces.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Raze buildings or salvage useful materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mop, brush, or spread paints, cleaning solutions, or other compounds over surfaces to clean them or to provide protection.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Position or dismantle forms for pouring concrete, using saws, hammers, nails, or bolts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Grind, scrape, sand, or polish surfaces, such as concrete, marble, terrazzo, or wood flooring, using abrasive tools or machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Place, consolidate, or protect case-in-place concrete or masonry structures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mix ingredients to create compounds for covering or cleaning surfaces.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mix, pour, or spread concrete, using portable cement mixers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate jackhammers or drills to break up concrete or pavement.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply caulking compounds by hand or caulking guns to protect against entry of water or air.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Tend machines that pump concrete, grout, cement, sand, plaster, or stucco through spray guns for application to ceilings or walls.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
